seoTitle: Trello Tutorial for Beginners: Get Organized Fast
metaDescription: Learn Trello from scratch, covering boards, lists, cards, checklists, labels, due dates, and Butler automation to organize your work and life.
intro: Trello uses a simple visual Kanban system to help you organize everything from personal goals to full business projects. This beginner tutorial covers setting up your first board, building out lists and cards, and adding the details that keep your workflow on track.

steps.heading: Create your first board
steps.body: From your Workspace dashboard, click Create New Board, then give it a descriptive title and choose a background and visibility setting.

steps.heading: Build your Kanban structure
steps.body: Add separate lists for stages like 'To Do', 'In Progress', and 'Completed' to establish your workflow.

steps.heading: Add cards to your lists
steps.body: Create your first project cards and give each one a clear, actionable title.

steps.heading: Add details to a card
steps.body: Click a card to expand its back panel, then add a description and build out a checklist of subtasks.

steps.heading: Use labels and due dates
steps.body: Apply color-coded labels to organize cards by priority or category, and set due dates to track deadlines.

steps.heading: Assign members and explore automation
steps.body: Add team collaborators through the Members sidebar, and check out the Butler automation icon for basic one-click task rules.

faq.question: Is Trello free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, Trello offers a free tier that covers the core features shown in this tutorial, including boards, lists, cards, and checklists.

faq.question: What is the Kanban system Trello is based on?
faq.answer: Kanban is a visual workflow method that organizes tasks into columns representing different stages, like To Do, Doing, and Done.

faq.question: Can I use Trello just for personal tasks?
faq.answer: Yes, many people use Trello boards to track personal goals and daily routines, not just team projects.

faq.question: How do I move a card between stages?
faq.answer: Simply drag and drop the card from one list to another to update its status.
